value.found_quote: Memories let Codex carry useful context from earlier threads into future work. After you enable memories, Codex can remember stable preferences, recurring workflows, tech stacks, project conventions, and known pitfalls so you don’t need to repeat the same context in every thread.
value.rationale: The page is OpenAI's official Codex documentation describing a "Memories" feature that lets Codex carry useful context across threads — directly substantiating that OpenAI offers Codex memory. The feature is off by default but available/enableable, so it is active (generally available, opt-in). The claim's framing about Hindsight/AGENTS.md is editorial context, but the core claim that OpenAI offers Codex memory is substantiated.
